title: Lord of the Rings Music Disc Resource Pack
description: This resource pack changes the discs to be LOTR music
body:
This texture pack changes all the music discs' sounds and textures to be LOTR themed! The creators of this pack are the creators of The Blockbuster Bros, and Foster's Creations on Youtube. If you are a LOTR fan like us, you will love this resource pack

Music used:
Howard Shore - Misty Mounains,
 Howard Shore - Sauron Theme,
 Howard Shore - Dreaming of Bag End,
 Howard Shore - Éowyn's Theme,
 Howard Shore - Prologue： One Ring to Rule Them All,
 Howard Shore - The Realm Of Gondor,
 Howard Shore - Concerning Hobbits(Dubstep),
 Howard Shore - Concerning Hobbits,
 Howard Shore - Samwise the Brave,
 Howard Shore - Rohan Theme,
 Howard Shore - The Rings of Power theme,
 Howard Shore - The Lord of the Rings Main theme,
 Howard Shore - Axe or Sword?,
 Howard Shore - Smaug,
 Howard Shore - The Quest for Erebor,
 Howard Shore - Thrice Welcome,
 Howard Shore - The Forest River,
 Howard Shore - Out of the Frying-Pan,
 Howard Shore - auriel's Theme,
 Howard Shore - My Dear Frodo,
 Howard Shore - Gollum's Song,

 If you want the discs to not cut off, download our data pack here: https://modrinth.com/datapack/lord-of-the-rings-data-pack
